general_info.definition: graphene quantum dots (GQDs) synthesized via a facile synthetic route

structural.morphology: Evenly and sparsely distributed on the surface of composite of ZnO nanosheets

applications.performance: Power Conversion Efficiency (PCE): 5.27%; relatively high photocurrent of 12.2 mA cm-2; open-circuit voltage: 0.68V;  Dye loading amount increased from 1.18 to 1.39 10-7mol cm-2; FF = 0.63
applications.comparative_advantage: the cell composed of GQDS on the surface ZNSs exhibited the best efficiency of 5.27% which is 41% enhancement comparable to that of ZNSs-based device
